top_signals.title: Great British Summer Savings 2026: Family activities VAT relief fact sheet
top_signals.summary: From 25 June to 1 September 2026 the Government is introducing a temporary reduced rate of VAT on children's menu meals in restaurants and family leisure activities over the summer period, cutting VAT from 20% to 5%.

top_signals.title: Great British Summer Savings: VAT slashed to save families money on days out
top_signals.summary: Families will enjoy discounted attractions and meals out this summer, with the launch of the government’s Great British Summer Savings scheme to help people enjoy day out for less.

top_signals.title: Former SNP chief admits embezzling £400K of party funds to ‘bankroll lavish lifestyle’
top_signals.summary: The former chief executive of the Scottish National Party, Peter Murrell, who is also Nicola Sturgeon’s estranged husband, has been remanded in custody after plesding guilty to embezzling hundreds of thousands of pounds from the party.  Murrell pleaded guilty on Monday morning when he appeared at the High Court in Edinburgh.  Murrell admitted to embezzling [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
